description_long: This stuffed toy features a round, plump body with a predominantly pink and white color scheme. Its face is adorned with blue circular cheeks, a blue bow tie, and a small, round blue nose, giving it a cheerful and whimsical appearance. The toy wears a large, bright green frog hat with big, white eyes and a wide black smile, which covers the top of its head and adds a playful character element. The body is soft and plush, with stubby arms and no visible legs, and it sits atop a simple, rectangular lavender base. The surface appears matte and soft, typical of plush toys, and the stitching details are minimal, emphasizing a smooth, cartoon-like finish. The overall design is cute and inviting, likely appealing to children and fans of character-themed toys.
description: A round, pink and white stuffed toy with a blue bow tie and a large green frog hat, sitting on a lavender base. It has a cheerful face and a soft, plush appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's face, blue bow tie, round blue nose, and the full frog hat with its smiling face.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the frog hat and the rounded back, with the toy's face partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, pink back of the toy and the back of the frog hat, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the frog hat's side and the toy's rounded body.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon penguin wearing a frog hat
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful, with round blue cheeks, a small round blue nose, and a simple smiling mouth. The eyes are wide and open, giving a friendly and inviting look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with its arms slightly out to the sides and body resting on a flat base.
